### 5.8: Naming Molecular (Covalent) C

• Learning Objectives

• Recognizing the name of a simple molecular compound

## Molecular Compounds

Molecular compounds are organic compounds that contain carbon atoms bonded to H or carbon and carbon atoms bonded to H, O, N, S, Si, P, or other elements.
